description_long: This recliner features a sleek, modern design with a smooth, contoured seat and backrest, both finished in a glossy black material. The exterior shell is predominantly white with bold, angular black lines and subtle geometric accents, giving it a futuristic, high-tech appearance. The seat and backrest are integrated into a single, continuous form, with no visible seams or joints, and the base is a wide, flat platform that provides stability. There are no visible armrests or footrests, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The surface appears hard and polished, likely made from molded plastic or composite materials, with a slight sheen that reflects light. The overall shape is ergonomic, designed to comfortably support a seated person in an urban public or semi-public environment.
description: A modern, glossy black and white recliner with a continuous, contoured seat and backrest, featuring bold geometric accents and a wide, stable base. The design is minimalist and futuristic, with no visible armrests or footrest.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the smooth, contoured seat and backrest with glossy black surfaces and angular white shell.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the white exterior shell with black geometric lines and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the continuous backrest and the wide, flat base for stability.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the ergonomic seat and backrest integration, as well as the glossy finish and minimalistic design.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests are present; the sides are smooth and continuous, blending seamlessly with the seat and backrest for a minimalist look.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single continuous piece, smoothly integrated with the seat and lacking any visible segmentation or separate sections.
